transcript: Speaker A: AI Coach, en skills pathi pesa try pannumbodhu naan eppovume stuck aayiduven. Words ellam appadiye maranjidra maadhiri irukkum. [AI Coach, when I try to talk about my skills, I always get stuck. It feels like the words just disappear.] Speaker B: It happens to the best of us. Let's practice a simple line. Say, 'I am proficient in computer applications.' Speaker A: I am pro-fish-ent... in computer applications. Speaker B: Close! It's 'Pro-fi-shient.' Try focusing on the middle sound. Let's do it again. Speaker A: I am proficient in computer applications! Speaker B: Spot on! With 100% accuracy. Speaker A: Usually, naan oru teacher-kitta oru word-ah 10 thadava repeat panna solla romba shy-a feel pannuven. Aana SpeakX kooda naan perfect aagura varaikkum practice panna mudiyudhu. Yaarum enna judge panna maattaanga, improvement mattum dhaan. English-la struggle pannaadheenga. Unga own AI coach app-ah vaangikkoonga, adhuvum coffee price-la. SpeakX app-ai download pannunga! [Usually, I would feel very shy to ask a teacher to repeat a word 10 times. But with SpeakX, I can practice until I am perfect. No one will judge me, only improvement. Don't struggle in English. Get your own AI coach app, that too at the price of a coffee. Download the SpeakX app!]
on_screen_text: AI Coach, en skills pathi pesa try pannumbodhu naan eppovume stuck aayiduven. Words ellam appadiye maranjidra maadhiri irukkum. [AI Coach, when I try to talk about my skills, I always get stuck. It feels like the words just disappear.] It happens to the best of us. Let's practice a simple line. Say, 'I am proficient in computer applications.' I am pro-fish-ent... in computer applications. Close! It's 'Pro-fi-shient.' Try focusing on the middle sound. Let's do it again. I am proficient in computer applications! Spot on! with the 100% accuracy. Usually, naan oru teacher-kitta oru word-ah 10 thadava repeat panna solla romba shy-a feel pannuven. Aana SpeakX kooda naan perfect aagura varaikkum practice panna mudiyudhu. Yaarum enna judge panna maattaanga, improvement mattum dhaan. [Usually, I would feel very shy to ask a teacher to repeat a word 10 times. But with SpeakX, I can practice until I am perfect. No one will judge me, only improvement.] My water is ____. hots / cold. Her tea ___ cold. AMAZING onto the next one. English-la struggle pannaadheenga. Unga own AI coach-ah vaangikkoonga, adhuvum coffee price-la. SpeakX app-ai download pannunga! [Don't struggle in English. Get your own AI coach, that too at the price of a coffee. Download the SpeakX app!] Speak normally ENGLISH. SpeakX KEY TO CONFIDENCE. Download Now.
summary: A Tamil-speaking woman demonstrates practicing English pronunciation with the SpeakX AI coach app. The AI corrects her pronunciation of 'proficient' in real-time, offering a judgment-free learning environment. She encourages viewers to download the app for the price of a coffee.
